name: Caylor-Nickel Foundation Family YMCA
description: Caylor-Nickel Foundation Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Bluffton, IN. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Joni's Court
description: Joni's Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bluffton, IN. There is 1 indoor concrete court. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.
fees: Fee required — $3 an hour per person Information to pay in barn - Cash or Venmo

name: Lancaster Park
description: Come play pickleball at Lancaster Park in Bluffton, IN! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water.

name: Life Community Church
description: Life Community Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bluffton, IN. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The courts are private. Amenities include locker rooms, water, and restrooms.

name: Lions Park
description: Lions Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bluffton, IN. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: MyPickleFix
description: MyPickleFix is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ossian, IN. There are 2 indoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Ossian Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Ossian Tennis Courts in Ossian, IN! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: SW Pickleball Country Club
description: SW Pickleball Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Warren, IN. There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Tower Park
description: Tower Park is a place to play pickleball in Warren, IN. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Washington Park
description: Washington Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bluffton, IN. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.
